user_story: As an employee, I want to view the organizational chart, so that I can understand the company structure and leadership
acceptance_criteria: Given I open the Org Chart screen; When the page loads; Then the organizational chart is displayed

user_story: As an employee, I want to see each person's name, department and role in the org chart, so that I know who leads each function
acceptance_criteria: Given the Org Chart is displayed; When I view a node; Then it shows the person's name, department and designation
